name: systemd-shortcuts

metadata.name: systemd-shortcuts
metadata.summary: A small utility to have some common systemd/journalctl shortcuts

documentation:
# systemd_shortcuts

A small utility library for checking the status / restarting and viewing logs of systemd services.

functions.name: service_helper.cli
documentation: A cli tool to manage systemd services.

functions.name: service_helper.status
documentation: Check the status of a service.

functions.name: service_helper.logs
documentation: Show the latest logs of a service.
